nasb.text: Next to them Meremoth the son of Uriah the son of Hakkoz made repairs. And next to him Meshullam the son of Berechiah the son of Meshezabel made repairs. And next to him Zadok the son of Baana also made repairs.

esv.text: And next to them Meremoth the son of Uriah, son of Hakkoz repaired. And next to them Meshullam the son of Berechiah, son of Meshezabel repaired. And next to them Zadok the son of Baana repaired.

cnv.text: 接著的一段由哈哥斯的孫子、烏利亞的兒子米利末修築；再接著的一段由米示薩別的孫子、比利迦的兒子米書蘭修築；再接著的一段由巴拿的兒子撒督修築。

ccb.text: 再下一段由哈哥斯的孙子、乌利亚的儿子米利末修筑。 再下一段由米示萨别的孙子、比利迦的儿子米书兰修筑。 再下一段由巴拿的儿子撒督修筑。
